VORFALE_TWEAKS.ReloadSceneContent: This tweak changes scene rendering. Reload Foundry now?
VORFALE_TWEAKS.DependencyUnavailable: This tweak is disabled because a required system or module is not active.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.sr-portraits.name: SR Portraits
VORFALE_TWEAKS.sr-portraits.hint: Shows the speaking token portrait in chat and opens the actor sheet from that portrait.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-images.name: Chat Images
VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-images.hint: Adds chat media posting, uploads, paste support, and media previews.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.levels.name: Levels
VORFALE_TWEAKS.levels.hint: Adds level background token hiding controls for opaque floor pixels.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.round-token-borders.name: Round Token Borders
VORFALE_TWEAKS.round-token-borders.hint: Draws token hover and control borders as round rings instead of square frames.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-auto-scroll-fix.name: Chat Auto Scroll Fix
VORFALE_TWEAKS.chat-auto-scroll-fix.hint: Keeps chat pinned to the newest message when appropriate.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.sr5-aa-bridge.name: SR5 Automated Animations Bridge
VORFALE_TWEAKS.sr5-aa-bridge.hint: Triggers Automated Animations from Shadowrun 5 rolls and preserves AA automatic recognition settings.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.linklame-macos-keybind.hi: Changes conflicting macOS shortcuts for Quick Insert and Shadowrun Prompt Success Test on each macOS client.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.random-ambient-sounds.hin: Lets ambient sounds play random files from a folder or wildcard path.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.actor-token-setup.name: Actor Token Setup
VORFALE_TWEAKS.actor-token-setup.hint: Adds quick actor portrait, token image, hover image, and token name setup.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.roof-occlusion-fix.name: Roof Occlusion Fix
VORFALE_TWEAKS.roof-occlusion-fix.hint: Prevents Fade roof tiles from being opened by unrelated visible tokens under the roof.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.plain-chat-input.name: Plain Chat Input
VORFALE_TWEAKS.plain-chat-input.hint: Disables automatic markdown-style formatting shortcuts in the chat input.
